content.text: Now let me search for the relevant CSS classes in the global.css file using grep:

Based on my search of the files, here are the WC3-style border/highlight/selection classes and their key CSS properties:

## WC3-Style Border & Selection Classes

### List Box Selection
- **`.wc3-listbox-item`** — Basic list item
  - `color: #dbe4ff`; `height: 20px`; `padding: 0 12px`; `background: transparent`

- **`.wc3-listbox-item:hover`** — Hover state
  - `color: var(--wc3-gold)`; `background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)`

- **`.wc3-listbox-item--selected`** — Selected state
  - `color: var(--wc3-gold)`; `background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12)`

### Menu Button Borders & Highlights
- **`.menu-button-border`** — Border frame
  - `position: absolute`; `inset: 0`; `background-repeat: no-repeat`; `background-size: 100% 100%`

- **`.menu-button-highlight`** — Highlight overlay
  - `position: absolute`; `inset: 0`; `background-repeat: no-repeat`; `background-size: 100% 100%`; `transition: opacity 80ms linear`; `mix-blend-mode: screen`

### Bar Borders & Highlights (for progress/health bars)
- **`.wc3-bar-border`** — Bar border frame
  - `position: absolute`; `inset: 0`; `background-repeat: no-repeat`; `background-size: 100% 100%`; `image-rendering: auto`; `pointer-events: none`

- **`.wc3-bar-highlight`** — Bar highlight/glow
  - `position: absolute`; `inset: 0`; `background-repeat: no-repeat`; `background-size: 100% 100%`; `image-rendering: auto`; `pointer-events: none`; `mix-blend-mode: screen`; `opacity: 0.62`

### Command Button Highlights
- **`.cmd-btn-highlight`** — Button highlight on hover/active
  - `position: absolute`; `inset: 0`; `background-size: 100% 100%`; `mix-blend-mode: screen`; `opacity: 0`; `transition: opacity 80ms linear`; `pointer-events: none`; `z-index: 4`

- **`.cmd-btn:hover .cmd-btn-highlight`** — Active state
  - `opacity: 1`

- **`.cmd-btn-highlight--on`** — Alternative active class
  - `opacity: 1`

### Menu Option Selection
- **`.popup-menu-option[aria-selected="true"]`** — Selected option
  - `color: var(--wc3-gold)`; `background: transparent`

### Panel Styles
- **`.wc3-panel:hover`** — Panel hover state
  - `border-color: #fcd31280` (subtle gold glow)

- **`.viewport--race-card-borders .section-card`** — Race-specific card border (9-slice)
  - `border: 18px solid transparent`; `border-image-source: var(--section-card-border-image)`; `border-image-slice: 64`; `border-image-width: 1`; `border-image-repeat: round`

### General Section Card
- **`.section-card`** — Container with border
  - `background: var(--card-bg)`; `border: 1px solid var(--card-border)`; `border-radius: 8px`; `padding: 24px`

## BordersSection Component
The BordersSection component (in `/home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/src/components/sections/BordersSection.tsx`) displays all border textures by:
- Loading BLP border texture files via the `loadBlpDataUrl` prop
- Rendering previews using 9-slice atlas detection and canvas rendering
- Organizing borders by category with labels
- Uses classes: `.borders-grid`, `.border-item`, `.border-thumbnail`, `.border-label`
